disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Long-standing multiple rough scaly patches on chronically sun-exposed skin
trigger_question_examples: Have you had many rough scaly spots on sun-exposed skin for years?
Are there other similar patches on your scalp, face or hands?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes, I've had lots of rough dry patches on my scalp, face and hands for years.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: The lesion has NOT rapidly grown into a firm raised lump or a deep non-healing ulcer
trigger_question_examples: Has that spot grown quickly into a firm raised lump or a deep sore that won't heal?
Does it feel hard and lumpy underneath?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, it hasn't grown into a lump — it's the same rough patch, just got sore and bled when I touched it.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: I'm not sure, it just hurts.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: On a blood thinner (apixaban), which explains easy bleeding from minor trauma
trigger_question_examples: Are you on any blood thinners?
Do you bruise or bleed easily?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes, I take apixaban for my heart — I do bleed and bruise more easily on it.
